description: Encrypted envelope containing one inner record. The relay sees only ciphertext. Decryption requires the workspace DEK from the associated keyring.

innerType.description: The ATProto NSID of the inner record type (e.g., com.minomobi.crm.deal). Cleartext for query filtering.

keyringRkey.description: rkey of the vault.keyring record that holds the DEK for decryption.

ciphertext.description: AES-256-GCM ciphertext of the DAG-CBOR-serialized inner record (includes auth tag).
